label: produced strong-form health claim
note: Fat acceptance movement generated HAES as its medical framework, extending dignity advocacy into contested health claims.

label: normalized weight as core identity
note: Community reward structures make losing weight feel like betrayal of in-group, converting a health condition into load-bearing identity.

label: legitimate bias fueled movement
note: Documented poor medical care for larger patients provided the real grievance that grew the movement.

label: same identity lock-in pattern
note: Both fat acceptance and incel communities use identity capture to insulate members from self-examination. Leaving = betrayal.

label: fandom becomes identity not interest
note: For a subset, MLP fandom becomes a surrogate social world rather than an entertainment preference.

label: fursona as identity displacement
note: Fursona construction suggests the appeal is not anthropomorphic animals but an alternate self that opts out of uncomfortable human identity.

label: illness becomes personality
note: Communities develop reward structures where being sicker generates more engagement, and recovery threatens belonging.

label: anger makes rejection more likely
note: Ideology produces entitlement and anger which function as social repellents, confirming the ideology's predictions and deepening commitment.

label: proved government capable of atrocity
note: Declassified confirmation that the U.S. government ran non-consensual human experimentation created a permanent legitimate basis for institutional distrust.

label: exposed program publicly
note: 1975 Senate investigation brought MK Ultra into public record, converting a hidden atrocity into documented history.

label: demonstrated government lies at highest level
note: Nixon's coverup confirmed that presidential-level deception was real, contributing to collapse of institutional trust.

label: created exploitable audience
note: Populations without reliable epistemic tools cannot distinguish documented institutional failure from unfalsifiable conspiracy claims.

label: weaponized real grievances
note: MK Ultra, regulatory capture, and corporate chemical harm are all real. Grifters use them as entry points to supply false villain narratives.

label: eroded trust in scientific consensus
note: Documented cases of corporations suppressing research (tobacco, PFAS, lead) make it rational to distrust scientific claims that touch corporate interests.

label: textbook regulatory failure
note: PFAS contamination persisted for decades with industry knowledge due to regulatory agency capture by chemical manufacturers.

label: real lies enable false ones
note: 'They lied about X therefore they could lie about Y' is logically invalid but emotionally coherent when X is genuinely true.

label: exclusion created the stereotype
note: Jews were barred from guilds and most professions. Moneylending was permitted. The stereotype of Jewish financial control was created by the exclusion, then blamed on the excluded.

label: theological infrastructure already existed
note: Luther's late antisemitic writings drew on 1000 years of accumulated Christian theological antisemitism.

label: texts directly reprinted by Nazis
note: Nazi propagandists literally reprinted Luther's antisemitic texts as ideological material. Not metaphorical — actual publication.

label: fabricated evidence of conspiracy
note: Proven forgery from 1903 was treated as documentary evidence of Jewish conspiracy by Nazi propagandists despite its exposed status.

label: psychological mechanism was the vehicle
note: Medieval antisemitism was not only theological — it also served as a scapegoating mechanism for plague, economic anxiety, and social instability.

label: dehumanization preceded genocide
note: Propaganda created the psychological infrastructure for genocide by dehumanizing target populations before the machinery of extermination was operational.

label: 2000 years of infrastructure
note: The Holocaust required no new ideology. It executed on antisemitic frameworks that had been built and maintained for two thousand years.

label: villain slot is always available
note: Grifters supply pre-made villains into a psychological slot that humans reliably create when experiencing diffuse systemic anxiety.

label: dignity advocacy captured by identity framework
note: The legitimate core of fat acceptance (medical bias, dignity, anti-stigma) was colonized by an identity framework that makes improvement feel like betrayal.

label: mechanism produces documented outcome
note: Legitimate Grievance Capture is the mechanism. Political radicalization is the real-world outcome it frequently produces. The mechanism node explains the why; the reference node is the what.
